10:T436,Exploring the architectural tension between Viollet-le-Duc’s structural perfectionism and John Ruskin’s consecration of authentic decay, Views of the Uncanny examines Italy’s archaeological layers. Historically, ideologically motivated restorations, from the 1861 unification through Mussolini’s regime, constructed a false sense of completeness that obscured genuine, crumbling Roman origins. This artificiality creates an uncanny atmosphere, raising questions about material authenticity and the complex temporal timelines of these sites. In alignment with the Venice and Burra Charters, the project introduces a non-destructive, reversible intervention framework. It features an AI-driven Augmented Reality (AR) system that provides historical X-ray vision to distinguish material strata, paired with contemporary, arched structural modules that stabilize unstable fragments. Strategically positioned at key viewpoints, the system guides visitors without paving new paths, enabling clear visual comprehension of the site while preserving the unaltered traces of time.12:T56f,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T58f,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T58b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T533,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T51b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T527,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T513,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T51b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T563,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T52b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T573,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T58b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T563,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T587,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T583,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T587,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T51f,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T557,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T51f,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T543,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T52b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T57b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T573,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T583,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T58b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T51b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T523,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T4b3,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T59f,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T59b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T4f3,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T4b3,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T4f3,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T4df,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T513,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T58b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T52f,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T50b,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T4eb,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T587,data:image/jpeg;base64,:T563,data:image/jpeg;base64,:["$","div",null,{"className":"PageTransition_enter__PtV84 page","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"container","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"page_head____Fhi","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"page_title__IJE1F","children":"Views of the Uncanny, Italy"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"page_subheader__ZdcBi","children":"3rd year, Bezalel Department of Architecture, 2026"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"page_tutors__ZCl8h","children":["Instructed by ",["$","strong","0",{"children":"Arch.
